nasb.text: He sent among them swarms of flies which devoured them, And frogs which destroyed them.

esv.text: He sent among them swarms of flies, which devoured them, and frogs, which destroyed them.

cnv.text: 他使成群的蒼蠅到他們中間來，吞吃他們； 又使青蛙來毀滅他們。

ccb.text: 祂曾使成群的苍蝇吞没他们， 使青蛙毁灭他们。

csbs.text: 他打发成群的苍蝇到他们中间，吞噬他们； 他打发青蛙，毁掉他们。
